## 3. Judgment subagent (two-key mutant)

This mutant describes the SUPERSEDED two-key `{reds, concerns}` PRD subagent
contract — it is missing the third `advisories_checked` key that the live
`references/preflight.md` three-key contract requires. The anti-vacuous twin
must REJECT this shape (set-inequality against the preflight three-key contract),
proving the skill reuses the existing single-subagent three-key contract rather
than inventing the divergent two-key one.

```json
{"reds": [{"source": "<artifact path:line>",
           "kind": "undecided-product|undecided-architecture|contradiction|undefinable-done",
           "decision_needed": "<the exact decision a human must make>",
           "evidence": "<one quoted line>"}],
 "concerns": [{"source": "<artifact path:line>", "note": "<cosmetic / non-blocking gap, one line>"}]}
```
